skill_execution.question: Who set the fastest lap in qualifying?

sql:
WITH LatestQualifyingSession AS (
    SELECT
        session_key,
        event_name
    FROM
        f1_data_library_DS.sessions
    WHERE
        session_type = 'Qualifying'
        AND season = 2026
    ORDER BY
        date_start DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    dn.full_name,
    dn.driver_code,
    lqs.event_name,
    FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%M:%S.###', TIMESTAMP_SECONDS(l.lap_duration)) AS fastest_lap_time
FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.laps AS l
JOIN
    LatestQualifyingSession AS lqs
ON
    l.session_key = lqs.session_key
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_driver_number_mapping AS dn
ON
    l.driver_number = dn.driver_number
    AND l.season = dn.season
WHERE
    l.lap_duration = (
        SELECT MIN(lap_duration)
        FROM f1_data_library_DS.laps
        WHERE session_key = lqs.session_key
    )
LIMIT 1;
